# Alderis

## Modern Color Picker for iOS

Alderis is a modern color picker library for iOS tweaks. It provides a beautiful and intuitive interface for selecting colors.

## Features

- Modern, clean UI design
- HSB and RGB color models
- Color history
- Preset colors
- Smooth animations
- Used by many popular tweaks

## For Developers

This is a library package. Other tweaks can depend on this package to provide color picking functionality.

## Compatibility

- iOS 12.0 and later
- Required by many customization tweaks
- Successor to libColorPicker
